Name: Planetary Government
Description: This world is independently ruled by a planetary government, unaffiliated with any of the interstellar states of the Inner Sphere or the Periphery.
ReputationStatements: I won’t pretend we’re happy to hire outsiders. We’re just out of options.
You’re not our first choice. Or our second. Or even our fifth.
Try not to make things worse than they already are. That would be… impressive, in a bad way.
This situation is unfortunate. Your intervention is now part of the solution.
We don’t need miracles. Just results.
We didn’t think anyone would come. We’re glad you did.
You’ve done more for this world than most governments manage in a decade.
MissionSuccessStatements: A small victory to outsiders, perhaps. To us, it means survival.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The situation remains difficult, though your efforts prevented greater damage.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Small nations survive on trust. Today, ours was misplaced.
